chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Crl. Bail Application Nos.2283 & 2284 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For hearing of bail application. 21-02-2023 Mr. Mansoor Ali Thebo, Advocate a/w applicants. Mr. Talib Ali Memon, A.P.G. ============= Omar Sial, J: F.I.R. No. 372 of 2022 was registered under sections 342 and 34 P.P.C. at the Kalakot police station against the applicant Yousuf (in Crl Bail App No. 2283 of 2022) and applicant Mohammad Hassan ((in Crl Bail App No. 2284 of 2022). They both applied for bail but the learned 11th Additional Sessions Judge, Karachi South dismissed the applications on 18.11.2022. 2. I have heard the learned counsel for the applicant and the learned APG. None appeared for the complainant. My observations and findings are as follows. 3. An offence under section 342 P.P.C. is a bailable offence entitling the applicants to bail as of right. The interim pre-arrest bail granted earlier to them is therefore confirmed on the same terms and conditions. JUDGE
